title: Glassy-Jelly Irish Almonds Hash
description: A sweet and savory Irish-inspired dish featuring flaked almonds, perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the almonds and cook, stirring frequently, until they are lightly toasted.
Add the crushed pineapple, honey, and vanilla extract to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for 2 minutes, then stir in the heavy cream.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until it has thickened slightly.
Stir in the orange marmalade and juice, then cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Spoon the mixture into a serving dish and top with the mixed berries.
Serve warm, garnished with additional almonds and orange zest if desired.
